commitMessage: feat: added animation to the Charts

current_content.value:
NSTrackingArea(
                rect: .zero,
                options: [
                    .activeAlways,
                    .mouseEnteredAndExited,
                    .mouseMoved,
                    .inVisibleRect
                ],
                owner: self, userInfo: nil
            )

arguments.value:
NSTrackingArea(
                rect: .zero,
                options: [
                    .activeAlways,
                    .mouseEnteredAndExited,
                    .mouseMoved,
                    .inVisibleRect
                ],
                owner: self, userInfo: nil
            )

old_content.value:
NSTrackingArea(
            rect: .zero,
            options: [
                .activeAlways,
                .mouseEnteredAndExited,
                .mouseMoved,
                .inVisibleRect
            ],
            owner: self, userInfo: nil
        )

arguments.value:
NSTrackingArea(
            rect: .zero,
            options: [
                .activeAlways,
                .mouseEnteredAndExited,
                .mouseMoved,
                .inVisibleRect
            ],
            owner: self, userInfo: nil
        )
